description: Worker result or follow-up answer with raw activity events for formatting

result.description: Worker output text. One of: (1) SDK result string on completion, (2) follow-up answer bundle with USER QUESTION + WORKER RESPONSE + optional UPDATED PLAN, (3) concatenated recent assistant messages when SDK result is empty

events.description: Raw worker activity events from DB (filtered to meaningful types only). Same schema as format-plan events.
